content.en:
"The ancestral monument, that is an incomparably precious treasure in the chaos, don't say it's me, even the Dao powerhouses want to get the ancestral monument, but the ancestral monument is not something that can be obtained by an individual, where it was born, it has always been in that place, no one can take it, and even the Dao ancestors of the Dao realm can't take it!"

The Tibetan God True Monarch muttered.

"I don't understand!"

Ranhai Zhenjun and the others shook their heads, still not quite understanding.

"You know the True Ancestor of the Great Dao Realm and the Dao Ancestor of the Merge Dao Realm, right?" asked the Tibetan God True Monarch.

"I'll know!"

Ranhai Zhenjun and the others showed envy and longing.

Tibetan God True Monarch said: "Although the true ancestors in the chaos are rare, there are many of them, but there are too few Dao ancestors in the realm of the Dao Realm, and even some true ancestors of the anti-heaven level can be so strong that they can kill the weaker Dao Ancestors, but they still can't become Dao Ancestors, the reason is that they can't merge the Dao, as long as they can't merge the Dao, they can't become Dao Ancestors." The way is a perfect fusion of a road condensed by oneself, this step is too difficult, it is impossible to do it if you rely on yourself, but you can use one thing to merge the way, that is the ancestral monument!"

"What, the ancestral monument can make a Dao Realm powerhouse become a Dao Ancestor?"

The Troubled Sea True Monarch's expression changed greatly, revealing an incredible look one by one.

At this moment, they really realized the importance of the ancestral monument, which was enough to cause a lot of fighting!

"Then wouldn't a group of True Ancestor powerhouses soon descend here?"

Troubled Sea True Monarch worried.

"That's not going to happen!" "The Hidden God True Monarch shook his head, "The Dao powerhouses may be able to enter some universes at a heavy price, but the universe where the ancestral monument is located, even the Dao Ancestors can't enter. It strengthens the rules of the universe, and its rules must be followed in order to enter. "

"The true ancestors can't enter, so how can they use the ancestral monument to achieve the Dao Ancestor?"

The True Monarchs were curious.

"You should know that the Great Universe can accommodate the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, right?" said the Tibetan God True Monarch: "And the Great Universe is the Dao Realm that evolves again, and wherever there is a universe that gives birth to an ancestral monument, it has the potential to become the Dao Realm." And the strongest in the Dao Realm can allow the True Ancestors to enter, once the Dao Realm is born, there will definitely be a large number of True Ancestors entering to fight for the place of the Ancestral Monument. It is rumored that an ancestral monument is ultimately only allowed to produce nine Dao ancestors. Nowadays, there are very few ancestral monuments in the chaos, and they are all top secret, even I don't know how many ancestral monuments there are, but the value of an ancestral monument is too high, even Dao Ancestors will compete for ancestral monuments, after all, Dao Ancestors will also have true ancestor disciples under their command!"

"In this case, the dual universe of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe will inevitably become a great universe now?"

The true monarch of the chaotic sea.

"No!" explained the Tibetan God True Monarch: "From the perspective of probability, the probability of the dual universe becoming a large universe is still very small, once the fusion of the dual universe fails, not only will the dual universe disappear, but the ancestral monument is estimated to disappear as well." However, with the appearance of the Ancestral Monument, will those True Ancestors allow a Ancestral Monument to disappear? They will definitely do everything possible to merge the two universes into a large universe. Once it becomes a great universe, the universe will be stable, there will be no danger of destruction, and it will not be difficult to ascend to the Dao realm, but it will take a long time. True ancestors have an infinite lifespan, so they are naturally not afraid of waiting. "

"In that case, this time it will also be beneficial to our Hidden God Organization, at least those disciples will not fall because of the failure of the dual universe fusion!" said Chaos Sea True Monarch.

"Innocent!"

The Hidden God True Monarch said coldly: "Don't forget, if the Great Universe is born, the Divine Generals in the Chaos and even the Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses can enter the Great Universe, what advantage do we have, if we can't transcend before the Dual Universe becomes a Great Universe, then there is no way to leave." Do you think those scraps can transcend the Great Universe?"

Transcendence of the universe?

What are you kidding, they naturally don't think that these guys can transcend from the Great Universe, the geniuses who can transcend from the Great Universe are definitely the top geniuses in Chaos, as long as they don't fall halfway, they will definitely be able to become the powerhouses at the peak of the Great Dao Realm in the future, second only to the existence of Dao Ancestors!

"Inform them to do whatever it takes to detach themselves from the Twin Universes. If you can't get rid of it, you can only stay in the big universe forever. After that, let's find a way to live, our Tibetan God Organization can't send the Heavenly Mandate Realm into, otherwise I won't be able to get the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Mandate Realm out of the Great Universe!"

"We're going to find a way to inform them!"

The true monarch of the chaotic sea.

Next, the Tibetan God Organization explained the situation to the members of the Tibetan God Temple inside the Dual Universe, and then began to transfer power.

Because this area will inevitably be occupied by a large number of forces, it is too difficult for the Tibetan God Organization to survive in the cracks of these forces, and if they are not careful, they will be destroyed, and they dare not stay.

However, the Tibetan God True Monarch still reported the situation here to his master, the Nine Heavens Dao Ancestor, who had never met him before.

......

Chaos, Qilin Palace.

Qilin Allah is in retreat and cultivation in Qilin Palace, although he is only a true ancestor powerhouse in the early stage of the avenue, he also has a great reputation in the chaos, and his talent is not weak, and there is still room for improvement.

Suddenly.

His expression moved, and he was overjoyed.

Because a message came from the Qilin Hall of a certain universe, it was a message conveyed by a wisp of his consciousness clone, originally he didn't care about this Qilin Palace, but the message just conveyed made him can't help but be ecstatic.

"The ancestral monument has appeared!"

As a powerhouse of the Great Dao, he naturally understood the significance of the appearance of the ancestral monument.

The number of ancestral monuments in the chaos has long been used up, and some true ancestors with terrifying strength have waited for a long time, and they still have no chance to become Dao ancestors, and they are still waiting for new ancestral monuments to appear.

Although his strength is weak, he is also looking forward to the ancestral monument, what if he is lucky enough to become a Dao realm and become a Dao ancestor?

After all, according to his understanding, it is not that the stronger the strength, you can become a Dao Ancestor, you need a certain opportunity and luck.

Moreover, the stronger the strength, the more difficult it is to become a Dao Ancestor, and the ancestral monument just gives hope.

In the chaos, some True Ancestors who were too strong could not become Dao Ancestors, but some weaker True Ancestors were lucky enough to become Dao Ancestors.

Allah feels that although he is weak, he really has hope of becoming a Dao Ancestor.

"It seems to be the universe where the Dao Ancestor accepted disciples before, but I didn't expect such a coincidence that that the universe gave birth to the Ancestral Monument. It seems that it won't be long before the eyes of many True Ancestors and even Dao Ancestors will notice there. "

Kirin Allah muttered.

He is not in a hurry to go to that universe, after all, it is still an ordinary universe, not even a big universe, he can't enter it at all, only when that universe becomes the Dao realm, he will pass, and this process is too long.

"It's okay to lay out first, let my few disciples who don't make it go to the layout first!"

Allah plans the Kirin.

Immediately, he summoned those disciples who were at the peak of the True Spirit and asked them to go to the dual universe of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe.

Meanwhile.

The gaze of a famous Dao powerhouse crossed the space, and he knew the existence of the dual universe and the existence of the ancestral monument.

All of a sudden, the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe were under the attention of countless powers of Chaos.
